content.text:
<user_query>
Explore the repository to locate the calibration journey orchestration, state machine definitions, and frontend routing/screens for the flow from sign up through tutorial. Identify exact files and key symbols controlling step order, especially around scan, identity verification, wow cards, narrative, roadmap, report generation, ChiefMarketingSummary, AgentCalibrationChat, integration connect, executive snapshot/reveal, market, tutorial. Return: (1) file list with purpose, (2) current state sequence, (3) where to add abn_validation and social_enrichment states.
</user_query>
Searching the repository for calibration journey orchestration, state machines, and onboarding routing.

Here is a concise map of what exists in this worktree and how it chains together.

---

## 1) File list with purpose

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\hooks\useCalibrationState.js` | **Calibration journey orchestration**: `entry` string “state machine”, scan → identity → CMO → agent chat → integration → snapshot → complete; `autoSave` / `triggerComplete`; `handleAbnLookup`; navigates to `/market` after reveal. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\pages\CalibrationAdvisor.js` | **Screen router for `/calibration`**: maps each `cal.entry` to a component; OAuth resume `?step=integration_connect`; `CalibrationTutorial` keys from `entry`. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\context\SupabaseAuthContext.js` | **Global auth bootstrap**: `/api/calibration/status` → `NEEDS_CALIBRATION` vs `READY`; then `/api/onboarding/status`; caches in `sessionStorage`. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\ProtectedRoute.js` | **Route gates**: `NEEDS_CALIBRATION` → push `/calibration`; `READY` + onboarding incomplete → `/onboarding` (with exempt paths). |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\App.js` | **React Router**: `/register-supabase`, `/login-supabase`, `/calibration`, `/onboarding`, `/market`, etc. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\pages\LoginSupabase.js` | After login: `/calibration` if `NEEDS_CALIBRATION`, else `/advisor`. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\pages\OnboardingWizard.js` | **Post-calibration onboarding** (separate from `entry`): `STEPS` (`welcome` → … → `preferences`), persists via `/onboarding/save`, completes → `/soundboard`. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\pages\OnboardingDecision.js` | Chooses `/onboarding` vs defer to `/advisor`. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\calibration\ChiefMarketingSummary.js` | **CMO / “wow” footprint report** (editable sections, confirm). |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\calibration\AgentCalibrationChat.js` | **9-step agent persona** via `calibration-psych` (`callEdge`), then `onComplete`. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\calibration\PostCMOIntegrationOverlay.js` | **Integration connect** step after agent calibration. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\calibration\IntelligencePhases.js` | **`ExecutiveCMOSnapshot`**: executive intelligence snapshot (“Here’s what BIQc sees”), narrative/alignment from cognitive payload. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\calibration\ExecutiveReveal.js` | **`REVEAL_PHASES`**, “executive reveal” animation before redirect. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\calibration\ForensicIdentityCard.js` | **Identity verification** UI; `parseIdentitySignals` imported in `useCalibrationState.js`. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\calibration\CalibrationComponents.js` | Welcome / scan UI, manual fallback, `AuditProgress` (“analyzing”). |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\CognitiveLoadingScreen.js` | **`CognitiveIgnitionScreen`** for `entry === "ignition"`. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\calibration\CalibratingSession.js` | Wizard/chat UI when `entry === "calibrating"` (edge-driven `calibration-psych` alternate path). |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\TutorialOverlay.js` | **`TUTORIALS`** map (`/advisor`, `/market`, `calibration-welcome`, etc.), `CalibrationTutorial` / `PageTutorial`. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\components\DashboardLayout.js` | **`useTutorial(location.pathname)`** for in-app tutorials on routed pages. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\pages\MarketPage.js` | **Market** route: narratives, calibration CTAs to `/market/calibration`. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\pages\ForensicCalibration.js` | **`/market/calibration`** — separate forensic flow, not the main `entry` chain. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\frontend\src\pages\CalibrationPreview.js` | Dev/preview only; documents older `onboard-*` step names. |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\supabase\functions\calibration-psych\index.ts` | Edge: persona / wizard; completion updates `onboarding_state` / profile (server-side). |
| `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\myk\supabase\functions\calibration-business-dna\index.ts` | Edge: website scan / DNA extraction for calibration. |

**Key symbols controlling step order (calibration):**  
`useCalibrationState.js`: `entry`, `setEntry`, `handleAuditSubmit`, `handleConfirmIdentity`, `handleConfirmWow`, `handleAgentCalibrationComplete`, `proceedFromIntelligence`, `triggerComplete`, `detectState`.  
`CalibrationAdvisor.js`: conditional blocks on `cal.entry`.  
Auth order: `SupabaseAuthContext.js` (`AUTH_STATE.NEEDS_CALIBRATION`), `ProtectedRoute.js`.

---

## 2) Current state sequence (as implemented)

**A. Account / app routing (high level)**  
1. Register (`RegisterSupabase`) → typically back to login, not straight into the app.  
2. Login → if calibration incomplete, **`/calibration`**; else **`/advisor`**.  
3. Bootstrap (`SupabaseAuthContext`): **`calibration/status` first** → if not `COMPLETE`, **`NEEDS_CALIBRATION`** (user steered to calibration before normal app).  
4. When calibration is **`COMPLETE`**, fetch **onboarding status**.  
5. **`ProtectedRoute`**: if `READY` and onboarding not done → **`/onboarding`** (unless path is exempt, e.g. `/calibration`, `/settings`).  

So in practice: **calibration runs before the full app onboarding wizard**, not after.

**B. Calibration `entry` sequence (main happy path)** — driven in `useCalibrationState.js` and rendered in `CalibrationAdvisor.js`:

1. `loading` → `detectState()`  
2. If status not `COMPLETE`: `ignition` → user continues → `welcome`  
3. `welcome` (scan) / `manual_summary` → `analyzing` during scan  
4. Success → `identity_verification` (`autoSave(1)`)  
5. Confirm identity → `wow_summary` (`handleConfirmIdentity` → `autoSave(2)`)  
6. Confirm CMO report → `agent_calibration` (`handleConfirmWow` → `autoSave(3)`, `fetchIntelligence()`)  
7. Agent chat done → `integration_connect` (`handleAgentCalibrationComplete` → `autoSave(4)`)  
8. Overlay done/skip → `intelligence-first` (`ExecutiveCMOSnapshot`)  
9. Continue → `completing` + `ExecutiveReveal` (`proceedFromIntelligence` → `triggerComplete` → `autoSave(9,"COMPLETE")`)  
10. Effect in `useCalibrationState`: after reveal phases → **`navigate('/market', { replace: true })`**  

**Alternate / legacy `entry` values** still in the same hook/page: `calibrating` (`CalibratingSession`), `continuity`, `forensic`, plus `transitioning` overlay during CMO handoff.

**C. Post-calibration onboarding (separate from `entry`)**  
`OnboardingWizard` **`STEPS`**: `welcome` → `basics` → `website` → `market` → `product` → `team` → `goals` → `preferences` → complete → **`/soundboard`**.

**D. Tutorials**  
- On **`/calibration`**: `CalibrationTutorial` when `entry` is `welcome`, `calibrating`, or `wow_summary` (`CalibrationAdvisor.js`); content keys in `TutorialOverlay.js` (`calibration-welcome`, `calibration-chat`, `calibration-wow`).  
- After calibration, **`DashboardLayout`** uses **`useTutorial(pathname)`** for routes like **`/advisor`**, **`/market`**, etc. (`TutorialOverlay.js` `TUTORIALS`).

**E. “Roadmap” / “narrative” in this repo**  
- **Market narrative**: `MarketPage.js` (e.g. alignment / primary narrative copy).  
- **Executive snapshot narrative**: `ExecutiveCMOSnapshot` in `IntelligencePhases.js` (cognitive memo, alignment narrative).  
- **“Launch roadmap”** appears as marketing copy on `MoreFeaturesPage.js`, not as a calibration `entry`.

---

## 3) Where to add `abn_validation` and `social_enrichment` states

There is **no formal enum**; steps are **`entry` strings** and **`setEntry(...)`** calls. Add new states in the same two places everywhere:

1. **`useCalibrationState.js`** — define transitions: after which handler you `setEntry('abn_validation')` / `setEntry('social_enrichment')`, and what runs next (`autoSave` step numbers if you need persistence).  
2. **`CalibrationAdvisor.js`** — add `{cal.entry === 'abn_validation' && (...)}` (and same for `social_enrichment`) with your UI components.

**Suggested placement (aligned with current data flow):**

| New state | Logical insertion point | Why |
|-----------|------------------------|-----|
| **`abn_validation`** | **Immediately after successful scan** (after `setIdentitySignals` / before or instead of jumping straight to `identity_verification`), **or** as a dedicated screen **between `analyzing` and `identity_verification`** | Scan + enrichment already populate ABN candidates (`handleAuditSubmit` ~372–494); `handleAbnLookup` + `ForensicIdentityCard` live in the identity phase today—splitting **registry validation** into its own `entry` keeps `identity_verification` for broader confirmation. |
| **`social_enrichment`** | **After identity is confirmed** and **before `wow_summary`**, **or** after `wow_summary` and **before `agent_calibration`** | Deep scan already merges `social_media_links` / handles in `handleAuditSubmit`; a dedicated step is for **user review or extra enrichment** before the CMO report or before persona chat. Alternatively, if the intent is **OAuth/social connectors**, place it next to **`integration_connect`** (`PostCMOIntegrationOverlay`) in `CalibrationAdvisor.js` / the handler that sets `integration_connect`. |

**Also update** (if you add steps):  
- **`CalibrationTutorial`** / `tutorialKey` in `CalibrationAdvisor.js` if the new screens need guides.  
- **`autoSave` step indices** in `useCalibrationState.js` so server `current_step` stays monotonic and meaningful.  
- Any **backend** `strategic_console_state.current_step** consumers (e.g. `calibration-engine`) if those steps must be reflected server-side.

---

**Note:** The API implementation for `GET /api/calibration/status` is not under this worktree (only frontend callers were found); production behavior of “COMPLETE” vs “IN_PROGRESS” may also depend on that service and `strategic_console_state`.
